idea-plugin.name: Format Incrementer
idea-plugin.description:
Fill every caret/selection in the editor with a generated sequence - not just plain auto-increment. Place multiple carets (or selections), invoke Format Incrementer, pick a pattern, preview it live, and apply.

Supported patterns: numeric (start/step), zero-padded, radix (hex/oct/bin/custom), alphabetic (a, b, c, ... aa), Roman numerals, dates with a step, and a custom template such as item_{n} or row-{n:03}.

- by rsunder10 (RedEyeGuy)
idea-plugin.change-notes: 2.0.0 - Full rewrite on the modern IntelliJ Platform (Gradle, Kotlin). Adds a pattern picker with live preview supporting numeric, padding, radix, alphabetic, Roman, date, and template sequences. A single undoable edit now covers all carets.

action.description: Fill carets/selections with a generated sequence
